sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungkia in tawp san mah leh,
Ke'n bel ka Cross pua-in ka zui den ding;
Nisim in tha hong guan ding,
To zeisu ka nei zo hi,
Suplawh kei ning Zeisu nung ka zuih manin.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hong piak sa te bek ah lungdam ka hi kei hi,
Hong piak lai ding te ah zong A min phat ning;
Tua manin nisim in ah, gual zawhna la ka sa hi,
Suplawh kei ning Zeisu nung ka zuih manin.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka muh nai loh vantung gam,
Upna tawh tung ding ci'n ka gen khol ngam;
Hong piak thuah ding cih upna tawh ka mu ta.
